rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — #StopRansomware: Interlock
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/22
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*blog.sekoia.io*'
            - '*blog.talosintelligence.com*'
            - '*cisecurity.org*'
            - '*clickfix-attacks-sector-alert-tlpclear.pdf*'
            - '*hhs.gov*'
            - '*mail.cisa.dhs.gov*'
            - '*processhacker-2.39-bin.zip*'
            - '*qrpce91.exe.asd*'
            - '*stopransomware.gov*'
            - '*tmp41.wasd*'
            - '*webujgd.lnk*'
            - '*www.darkreading.com*'
            - '*www.hhs.gov*'
            - '*www.mcafee.com*'
            - '*www.tripwire.com*'
    condition: selection_ip
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX__StopRansomware__Interlock {
    meta:
        description = "#StopRansomware: Interlock"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
